title: Umihiko Yamahiko
synonyms: The Sea Boy and the Mountain Boy
synopsis: Long, long ago there were two brothers, named Umihiko and Yamahiko. The older brother, Umihiko, made his living catching fish in the sea. The younger brother, Yamahiko, made his living hunting birds and animals in the mountains. One day Yamahiko said to Umihiko, "Why don't we exchange my bow and arrows for your fishing tackle, and trade places?" After bothering him enough Umihiko agreed. The next day proved treacherous as they were unskilled. Umihiko hurt his arm and Yamahiko lost the fishing hook. Umihiko was extremely angered that Yamahiko's trade caused him to loose his prized hook, so even when his arm heals he'd never be able to fish again the same. Yamahiko strives to right his wrongs.

title: Kikansha Yaemon
synopsis: Animated 3D movie based on a bestseller picture book by Agawa Hiroyuki, illustrated by Okabe Fuyuhiko and published in 1959 by Iwanami Shoten Publishing.

title: Rain and Fish
synopsis: One rainy day a boy was waiting sulkily at a bus stop. Pitter-patter, raindrops leap and make waves in a puddle. Watching it, he saw something jumped. When the boy looked into the puddle, there was a red fish swimming. It is a story of a red fish a boy saw on a rainy day. 1st Year Work 2010 by Risa Kimpara, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Word of Honor 2nd Season
synonyms: บัญญัติวีรชน ภาคที่ 2
synopsis: Xie Kanhua was about to be executed in the Shanglin Celestial Palace. When Su Baiyi was rescuing him, the Shanglin Celestial Palace disintegrated, and Su Baiyi was taken away by Su Jian, the Demon Lord who had voluntarily confined himself in the secluded prison for twenty years. Then the Hero Conference of Xuanwei Town is held again, Bai Jile lures Divine Official Xue, the second-best martial artist in the world to participate, plunging the martial arts world into chaos. In order to save the injured Nangong Xi'er, Su Baiyi went to the North Kunlun with Su Jian to pay a visit to Su Suomo, the ancestor of the Su family, while Yuling and Feng Zuojun respectively headed to Qingcheng Mountain and the Demon Town to learn martial arts. Under the latent tension, the Yingzhou Immortal Island reappeared. The invaders from the island issued a provocation to the martial artists, saying that those who submit will prosper, while those who resist will perish...

title: Dream Animals THE MOVIE
titleNative: たべっ子どうぶつ THE MOVIE
synopsis: Dream Animals biscuits, a long-selling snack beloved by Japanese since its launch in 1978 has been sold in more than 20 countries around the world and features the animal names written in English on the biscuits. The product has enjoyed an explosion in popularity in recent years as merchandise, especially among young people. Now for the first time, the product is given treatment as an animated movie called Dream Animals: The Movie. How will these animal biscuit characters behave and sound as they embark upon a thrilling adventure while tugging at your heartstrings with endearingly rich personalities. (Source: TBS)

title: The Sparrow with the Slit Tongue
titleEnglish: The Sparrow with the Slit Tongue
synopsis: A traditional Japanese fable telling of a kind old man, his avaricious wife and an injured sparrow. The story explores the effects of greed, friendship and jealousy on the characters.

title: Wangu Shen Wang
synonyms: 万古神王 动态漫画
synopsis: Huge changes happen on the earth, the resuscitation of fairy makes everybody have access to celestial beings, an era of cultivation hence arrives! Xu Han, a man who is schemed to death in his previous life, gains the initiative before the resuscitation by virtue of of his memory. He is bound to become the strongest man so as to take his revenge. The reality, however, is different from his previous life because of him, will he successfully become the strongest one? Framed to death in his previous life, he is reborn to his high school and happens to witness the resuscitation of fairy and the radical change of the world. Being young again, he restarts cultivation. This time, he'll protect his friends and family, he'll leave no regret, and he'll be the eternal king!
